scripts.setup: npm install && (cd src-ts && bun install) && (cd core/backend && bun install) && npm run bun:compile && npm run gen
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend,electron-build,electron --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "cd src-electron && npx tsup --watch" "npx wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:1420 && cd src-electron && npx electron ."
scripts.dev:browser: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && npx playwright test --ui"
scripts.dev:backend: cd core/backend && PORT=3000 NODE_ENV=development bun main.ts
scripts.dev:with-feedback: npm run dev:feedback & npm run dev:electron
scripts.build: npm run bun:compile && npm run build:frontend && npm run build --workspace src-electron && npm run dist --workspace src-electron
scripts.gen: npm run modules:generate && npm run sdk:generate && npm run gen:openapi && npm run gen:sdk:orval
scripts.gen:check: npm run gen && git diff --quiet -- src-react/src/generated src-ts/shared/generated openapi.json || (echo 'Codegen not committed. Run npm run gen and commit generated files.' && git --no-pager diff -- src-react/src/generated src-ts/shared/generated openapi.json && exit 1)
scripts.test:ts: cd src-ts && bun test src test tests
scripts.test:ts:watch: cd src-ts && bun test src test tests --watch
